reason: Successfully tested browser use feature by having agent open example.com and retrieve the page title, confirming "Example Domain" in response
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with Super Agent dashboard showing three agents in sidebar
Found and clicked "QA-20260420-133929-70x3" agent in sidebar — Agent chat interface opened with message input field ready
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." into textbox — Message displayed in input field
Clicked Send message button — Message sent successfully, agent status changed to "working", session "Browser Page Title Verification Task" created
Waited 10 seconds for agent response — Agent executed two browser tool calls: opened browser to https://example.com and retrieved page title
Verified response mentions "Example Domain" — Response displays "The page title is Example Domain." with browser preview showing the loaded website
